code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useCallback}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CartContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);export const CartProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[items,setItems]=useState([]);const addToCart=useCallback(product=>{setItems(prev=>{const ex=prev.find(i=>i.id===product.id);if(ex)return prev.map(i=>i.id===product.id?{...i,quantity:i.quantity+1}:i);return[...prev,{...product,quantity:1}];});},[]);const updateQty=useCallback((id,qty)=>{if(qty<=0)setItems(prev=>prev.filter(i=>i.id!==id));else setItems(prev=>prev.map(i=>i.id===id?{...i,quantity:qty}:i));},[]);const removeItem=useCallback(id=>{setItems(prev=>prev.filter(i=>i.id!==id));},[]);const clearCart=useCallback(()=>setItems([]),[]);const total=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.quantity,0);const count=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.quantity,0);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CartContext.Provider,{value:{items,addToCart,updateQty,removeItem,clearCart,total,count},children:children});};export const useCart=()=>{const ctx=useContext(CartContext);if(!ctx)throw new Error('useCart must be used within CartProvider');return ctx;};
